title: Sitefinity CMS Content Item
description: Schema for a Sitefinity CMS content item as returned by the Content REST API

Id.description: Unique identifier of the content item (GUID)

Content.description: Main content body in HTML format

PublicationDate.description: Date and time when the item was or should be published

LastModified.description: Date and time of the last modification

UrlName.description: URL-friendly slug used in page routing

Tags.description: Free-form tags associated with the content item

Category.description: Taxonomy category IDs assigned to the content item

Provider.description: Sitefinity content provider name for multi-site configurations

Language.description: Language code of the content version (e.g., en, fr-FR)

examples.Title: Sitefinity 15.0 Release Announcement
examples.Content: We are excited to announce the release of Sitefinity 15.0...
examples.Summary: Major release with headless improvements and new REST API features.
examples.Author: editor@example.com
